title: draba cocuyana
intro: Draba cocuyana, also known as Cocuyan Whitlowgrass, is a species of flowering plant in the family Brassicaceae. This plant is used for its medicinal properties, particularly for its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. Draba cocuyana is traditionally used to treat various health issues, including wounds, fever, and respiratory problems, due to its health benefits such as pain relief and antioxidant properties. Herbal preparations of Draba cocuyana include infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which can be used to treat a range of health conditions.
